author: Brayan Molina
text: Went to get a new car, Diego and ms. Paige Dick-Nicolao help very fast. Very respectful and patience with me to decide wich car i want to get and end up with a Nissan Sentra SR with an amazing cuote . Thank you so much for your help guys

author: Fatime
text: We bought a Toyota Highlander at Younger Nissan about two weeks ago, and Diego was great from start to finish. He answered all our questions and really went above and beyond. Since we were coming from Pennsylvania, he offered to do a full 360 walk-around video of the car (in the rain mind you) to make sure everything matched what we saw in the pictures. During the test drive Diego was very knowledgeable and took the time to explain the vehicle’s history and maintenance records. The whole buying process was super easy, and Diego made us feel comfortable and confident about the purchase. To top it all off, Diego and another team member delivered the vehicle to us two days later once our Check was processed! I 200% recommend the dealership, and especially Diego, to anyone looking for a smooth , confident and stress-free car-buying experience. <3

author: LGsell
text: Excellent sales team. Diego went above and beyond to help me get a commuter vehicle for work. The whole team came through when I thought I was going to walk away empty handed. Couldn’t be happier with the outcome. Thanks again to everyone that helped me through this process

author: mizliz1020
text: Diego and Paige were amazing, thank you for making this unexpected purchase painless! Happy new year Younger Nissan!

author: jessica27conboy
text: Diego answered all our many questions and provided us fast and accurate answers. He and the finance manager, Ed, made this buying experience very smooth and easy. We highly recommend this dealership - they are very helpful and make sure their cars are in great condition!

author: Jordan
text: I had a great experience purchasing from Younger Nissan. I worked with Diego and Joey and both were great. There was absolutely zero pressure to buy and they seemed to genuinely care about me and my family. They offered extended test drives, which we appreciated, and were very honest and straightforward when answering questions. When it came time to negotiate the final purchase price, it was quite simple and straightforward. I came to them with what I felt was a fair deal for both sides and it was a quick handshake and that was it. Buying a car is a stressful and often frustrating experience, but honestly it was quite enjoyable at Younger. I would highly recommend purchasing a vehicle here, and I would definitely do business here again. I had a great experience and I think you will too!

author: Gebirgs1938
text: Diego was a fantastic sales rep. He was well informed, honest and didn't waste any of my time. I buy a lot of vehicles for my business and the folks at Younger Nissan were AMAZING! I'll be back.

author: L005hernandez
text: Awesome team of youngers nissan. They work hard to try match the numbers I had on my mind. Really easy transaction, also, I don’t have anyone to help me drive back home, but Diego give me a favor to drive the car home. Thank you and I hope we can do more business on the future.

author: rilmareis1
text: Amazin team! Customer service, sales, very approcheable management, knowledgeable finance department, awsome service team, kind and friendly cashier and parts service. I've been a customer at this établissement and can't say enough about their service. A great customer service, under an amazing management and qualified finance department. This is my 3rd purchase and I am 100% satisfied with the service I've obtained. I had the pleasure to be assisted by Diego as he did a fabulous job showing me around. Thanks you all! Once again, for your assistance.

author: louisakate
text: Extremely considerate and accommodating in helping me throughout my purchase. Diego and Edward made the process easy and enjoyable.

author: rphild
text: The sales rep (Diego) and finance manager (Paige) were both knowledgeable and courteous during the vehicle buying process. There was very little pressure to buy, and the experience was pleasant.

author: James (Jim) C
text: Found this vehicle on CarGurus. Was hesitant about purchasing since vehicle in MD and live in IA. After deciding to purchase Diego and Paige made arrangements to pick me up from Baltimore airport. Diego and Paige were excellent to work with.

author: Danica
text: The Customer service was exceptional from the second I walked on the parking lot until I was driving off in my new vehicle. Diego was my sales associate. He greeted me on the lot with the most welcoming smile. I told him exactly what I wanted and at what price. He then, tells me he has something for me and to come inside. On the showroom floor, is the SUV with everything I wanted and, at the price I stated to Diego. The manager Adam introduced himself and answered all my questions and was very professional. Then I went to finance with Paige she was very knowledgeable, professional, and comforting. She was able to beat the interest rate that I walked in the door with. Paige handled all of the finance, registration and HARD tags. I did have to return on Tuesday to drop something off and pick up a frame for my tag. Diego was off that day. I got to work with a different sales person Robert. He was unbelievable I asked him to place a decal on the back of my car. He didn't stop there he had to wash the car, towel dry it, vacuum the car, place the decal, did the tag frame. He then took the time to sit with me and explain all the bells and whistles of the car. Oh and made me take pictures with the new purchase. This may be a long review but I felt it necessary to thank everyone I worked with because they were truly a blessing.

author: Gabrielperezjr
text: Diego was very helpful and respectful and staff was great also dealer was quick and easy process when buying our car will def go back in the future

author: mariahashmat
text: Our first time that we bought a car at Younger Nissan in Frederick, Md. was a very wonderful experience. The Staff was GREAT!…we started with Diego Ortiz-Martinez our Sales Consultant who was so kind, knowledgeable, patience with all our inquires and so professional. Then, Rob Harley, General Sales Manager who assisted us with our tread in car, the new vehicle and many more issues that we had. Mr. Harley was very diligent, professional, pleasant and listened conscientiously to all our needs. At the end, we meet Paige Nicolas, Financial Manager, who is so professional, courteous, knowlegeable and joyful person. She made our financial time so smoothly and approachable. In general, my husband and me are VERY HAPPY with the lovely experience at this wonderful Dealer!, The Service that Diego, Rob and Paige are doing is not a regular Customer Service, it is a QUALITY SERVICE that we experienced at Younger Nissan of Frederick and that we are happy and grateful for. Sincerely, Maria & Faziurahman Hashmat

author: shrivjm
text: This was our first purchase from Younger and it was by far the easiest purchase we have ever made! Diego our salesperson was knowledgeable, friendly and not pushy at all. He worked well with everyone at the dealership to get us all the info we needed. Edward our finance guy had everything ready with a great explanation of the things we needed to do and sign. He has it down!!

author: Michele W
text: Diego was so patient with me and told me all I needed to know about the car I was buying. The process was very smooth and I appreciate the level of communication & care very much!

author: s72burns
text: Diego was great to work with. He was friendly, informative, helpful and quick to answer any questions I had.

author: Shwend
text: Words can not express how grateful I am to Paige, Diego, and Frank for making my experience will Younger Nissan as smooth and seamless as possible. They were absolutely amazing and handled my purchase with efficiency and knowledge - hands down the most on point dealership I have ever worked with. Aside from the service, they are really just lovely folks who take the time to listen which I truly appreciate! 200% better than Darcars Nissan of Rockville! Thank you Paige, Diego, and Frank!! :) You are AWESOME!!

author: romerogaby2005
text: Diego was such an amazing salesman and really made the process go smoothly because he spoke Spanish!

author: Megan Hergett
text: Joey, Diego, and Paige were fantastic to work with! They were able to get us quickly what we came in looking for, and out the door! Wasted no time, and didn’t get the run around either. Highly recommend this team.

author: Bpeppe89
text: I had a great experience with this dealership! I get the 2016 Nissan leaf and my sales person was Diego Ortiz. He was amazing! He worked with me for several days while I waited for my down payment to come in. He was patient and knowledgeable. Everyone at Younger Nissan was great when I arrived to do my paperwork. I definitely recommend this dealership and I definitely recommend Diego as your sales person he was truly amazing! Also the gentleman I had for financing was amazing. I do not remember his name I believe it was either Adam or Alex maybe but he was also very helpful and amazing.

author: nmillernot
text: My husband and I visited many dealerships recently test-driving different vehicles. We decided on a Pathfinder and purchased from Younger Nissan of Frederick. We had a great experience. Our salesman was Diego Ortiz who was pleasant and took care of us from the first phone call, and throughout our process. The manager who assisted us in our sale was Joey Johnson. He was also wonderful to deal with along with Paige Nicolao. The whole dealership was set apart from any others we visited. The employees genuinely take care of their customers, and I would highly recommend this dealership in the future. I look forward to our continued business with them. Nancy & Terry Reynolds

author: Carmen_oberry
text: Diego worked so hard to get us where we needed to be with a payment and safe family car that is fuel efficient. We worked the numbers and when we came in we were in and out in about 30 minutes. This is my second time purchasing a vehicle from Younger Nissan and it had always been the easiest process! Diego is not overbearing and really listens to what you need!

author: Margie H
text: What a great experience buying my Nissan Kicks. Eric Slate was easy to talk with and very knowledgable about the car, and answered my many questions easily. Diego Ortiz was a pleasure to work with as well. Ed Beleznay in the finance department also fielded my many questions and happily walked though the many scenarios for making the payment fit my budget. The whole team was great to work with and I am delighted with my new vehicle.
